name: Part 1 extension choices
description: Students choose the best option to extend a simple IELTS Speaking Part 1 answer.
author: IELTS Practice Team

questions.text:
I really enjoy shopping at the local market.

  1. It has lots of online discounts and home delivery services.
  2. It has a lot of fresh fruit and vegetables like mangoes and bananas.

I like going to shopping centres at the weekend.

  1. There are lots of cafés and places to relax with friends.
  2. People usually go there to grow vegetables and keep animals.

I usually buy my clothes online. It’s easier to find cheaper prices.

  1. I buy a lot of shirts and t-shirts for example
  2. For instance, the delivery takes a long time.

There’s a small café near my house that I really like.

  1. It sells car parts and electronic equipment.
  2. The coffee is good and the staff are very friendly.

I prefer shopping in supermarkets.

  1. You can buy almost everything you need in one place.
  2. It has a foodcourt and fine dining options.

I don’t enjoy shopping during busy times.

  1. The shops are crowded and it takes a long time to pay.
  2. The weather is usually colder and snowy.

I sometimes go to night markets with my friends.

  1. People mainly go there to study for exams quietly.
  2. There’s a fun atmosphere with music and street food.

I think online shopping is very convenient.

  1. I can order things from home without travelling anywhere.
  2. I always get the wrong sized items.
